content.text: : every token generates a query, and all tokens supply keys and values. This is the primary way decoder-only LLMs (GPT-style) and encoder stacks build contextual token representations used by agent planners and tool-calling models.
. The "self" prefix means source and target sequences are identical.
Agent prompts are long, structured messages. Self-attention lets the model relate a
tool result, or connect a variable name in code to its definition paragraphs above. Without self-attention, each token embedding would remain context-blind.
— all positions visible. Decoder-only LLMs use
self-attention: positions may attend only to previous tokens. The mask sets forbidden entries to

Causal mask (4 tokens):
      j=1  j=2  j=3  j=4
i=1    ✓    ✗    ✗    ✗
i=2    ✓    ✓    ✗    ✗
i=3    ✓    ✓    ✓    ✗
i=4    ✓    ✓    ✓    ✓
. Stacked layers progressively refine meaning—early layers often capture syntax; deeper layers capture task and intent relevant to agent behavior.
Resolves coreference and long dependencies in one hop per layer
Fully parallel over sequence length during training
Same machinery for prefill (processing prompt) and decode (generating one token at a time)
Causal masking prevents looking ahead—good for generation, limits bidirectional encoding in GPT-style models
; long agent threads hit latency and cost walls
Position must be injected separately via positional encoding or RoPE

Sentence: "Transfer $500 to account ending 4421 because the invoice said so." When processing "4421", self-attention can link it to "account" and "invoice" even if they are far apart—similar to linking a user-stated account ID to a tool parameter field.
Place critical constraints (output format, safety rules) where the model reliably attends—often system message and near the task
Use retrieval to shorten effective sequence rather than stuffing irrelevant text
When debugging, log token positions of tool schemas and errors near the generation point
Self-attention: Q, K, V all from the same sequence
Causal masking enables autoregressive LLMs used in agents
Each layer refines contextual embeddings used for next-token prediction and tool JSON
Quadratic cost is the main reason context windows and summarization matter
